active.label: Standard Issue
active.description: E Standard tuning only

active.label: Drop Day
active.description: Any Drop tuning (Drop D, Drop C, etc.)

active.label: Flat Earth
active.description: Half-step-down tunings

active.label: One Artist Takeover
active.description: All songs by the same artist

active.label: Decade Night
active.description: All songs from the same era

active.label: Throwback
active.description: Classic era songs (pre-1985)

active.label: New Blood
active.description: Songs added to CF in the last 60 days

active.label: Blindside
active.description: Song titles hidden until you play them

active.label: Fresh Off the Press
active.description: CDLC added in the last 7 days

active.label: Vintage Chart
active.description: CDLC uploaded to CF over 2 years ago

active.label: Album Side
active.description: All songs from the same album

active.label: Class Reunion
active.description: All songs from the same release year

active.label: Discography
active.description: Same artist, each song from a different album

active.label: Time Machine
active.description: One song per decade, oldest to newest

active.label: Counterclockwise
active.description: Setlist ordered newest release to oldest

active.label: Alphabet Soup
active.description: Song titles in alphabetical order

active.label: Title Chain
active.description: Each title starts with the last word of the previous

active.label: One Word
active.description: All song titles are a single word

active.label: Verbose
active.description: Titles must be five words or longer

active.label: Number Station
active.description: Every title contains a number

active.label: Punctuated
active.description: Titles with question marks, exclamations, or parentheses

active.label: Witching Hour
active.description: Dark themes: death, fire, blood, ghosts

active.label: Love Letter
active.description: Titles about love, heartbreak, or longing

active.label: Shared Letter
active.description: Every artist name starts with the same letter

active.label: Palette Swap
active.description: Each song in a different tuning family from the last

active.label: Dealer's Choice
active.description: A random modifier is picked and kept secret

active.label: Double Trouble
active.description: Two modifiers stack for this setlist

active.label: Leap Year
active.description: Songs released exactly 10, 20, 30, or 40 years ago today

active.label: Prime Time
active.description: Songs released in a prime-numbered year

active.label: Typecast
active.description: Every title starts with the same letter

active.label: Bookends
active.description: First and last song are by the same artist

active.label: Escalating Era
active.description: Each song newer than the last, no duplicates by year

active.label: Compound Word
active.description: Every title is exactly two words

active.label: Rorschach
active.description: Titles contain body parts: heart, eye, hand, blood, bone

active.label: Weather Report
active.description: Titles reference weather or sky: rain, storm, sun, moon, cloud

active.label: Color Wheel
active.description: Every title contains a color

active.label: Motion Picture
active.description: Titles with verbs of movement: run, fly, fall, dance, walk

active.label: Reanimated
active.description: Same album appeared in a prior daily in the last 30 days

active.label: Secret Handshake
active.description: All songs share a hidden attribute; guess what it is to complete

active.label: Rival Camps
active.description: Two artists only, alternating songs

active.label: Sundown
active.description: Titles reference endings: last, final, end, goodbye, over

active.label: Title Track
active.description: Song title matches the album title
